topic.title: Introduction to E-stim
topic.shortdesc: This is a beginner-friendly guide that explains how to administer electrical stimulation (e-stim) therapy using a multi-modality console. These instructions are designed for Sports Medicine Interns at UC Davis with little to no prior electrotherapy experience.

section.title: Purpose of This Guide
section.p: This guide teaches beginner users how to administer electrotherapy treatments through a series of step-by-step topics. Users will learn how to initialize the console, place electrode pads, modify parameters, and set up therapeutic currents (IFC, Premod, Combo).

ul.li: New interns with little or no clinical experience
Experienced interns who want a quick review of system interface basics
